meaning: n.雾号(浓雾信号),粗嘎的声音
examples: The foghorn boomed out its warning.
The bleating of a foghorn broke the silence.
Souter Lighthouse in South Shields will be the focal point of the Foghorn Requiem, to be performed in June.
He blew his nose, loud as a foghorn, and tossed the wadded tissue off the side of the building.
